results.title: LEGION BASEBALL: Hawks hold off visiting Mountain View
results.description: CHEYENNE – Senior Alex Vines went 4-for-5 with two doubles, a triple and five RBI to help the Cheyenne Hawks hold off Mountain View High of Loveland, Colorado, 18-14 on Sunday at Powers Field in Cheyenne.

results.title: Former Saint sensationally pulled from AFL Legends Game
Knicks champion tied up in nightclub scuffle involving Travis Scott
results.description: New York Knicks guard Jordan Clarkson had a run-in with police on Saturday while trying to keep the peace in a New York City nightclub. Clarkson was among the sea of celebrities spotted at Zero Bond nightclub for a party hosted by Raising Cane’s co-founder Todd Graves.

results.title: Lakers Hoping Jonathan Kuminga Gets Desperate After Trade News
results.description: The Los Angeles Lakers have been flirting with acquiring Jonathan Kuminga, but a major trade on Sunday might preclude that. The post Lakers Hoping Jonathan Kuminga Gets Desperate After Trade News appeared first on HEAVY.

results.title: Hamlin calls Logano's North Wilkesboro win 'wildly impressive'
results.description: Denny Hamlin credits Joey Logano after finishing one spot short in the Cup Series race at North Wilkesboro Speedway.

results.title: 2-Time Super Bowl Champion Calls Jalen Brunson ‘King of New York’
results.description: A New York sports legend, and fellow champion, passed along the highest of honors to Jalen Brunson on Saturday night. The post 2-Time Super Bowl Champion Calls Jalen Brunson ‘King of New York’ appeared first on HEAVY.

results.title: NASCAR points standings: Cup Series points update after North Wilkesboro race
results.description: Denny Hamlin continued to hold the NASCAR Cup Series points lead after the Window World 450 on July 19 at North Wilkesboro.

results.title: Former Sooner Star Pitchers' Journeys Come Full Circle
results.description: Patty Gasso couldn't help herself. Sitting in the stands at Tom Heath Field instead of the Sooners' dugout, Oklahoma's legendary head coach found herself invested in every pitch, every at-bat and every outcome. results.title: Antonelli wins to extend lead after Russell crashes out
results.description: Mercedes’ Kimi Antonelli re-established the comfortable championship lead that had been eroded in the past three races with victory in the Belgian Grand Prix while team-mate George Russell crashed out. The Italian fought back from a delay caused by a virtual safety-car period to catch and pass Ferrari’s Charles Leclerc for his sixth win in [...]

results.title: Denish Das tops marquee player buys at Assam Premier League player auction
results.description: Guwahati, July 19: Denish Das emerged as the most expensive buy during the marquee player round of the Assam Premier League (APL) Player Auction, with Barpeta Braves securing his services for Rs 12.60 lakh following an exciting round of bidding here on Sunday. Sumit Ghadigaonkar was the second-highest buy among the marquee players, joining Charaideo [...]

results.title: Rapp, 26, dies after being hit by car while cycling
results.description: American boxer Hannah Rapp died on Saturday after being hit by a car while cycling in Texas. Rapp, 26, was passed by a car which suddenly came to a stop then reversed into her, according to the Brazos County sheriff’s office. The driver has been arrested and charged with manslaughter. Rapp challenged for the WBC [...]

results.title: Unable to fight back tears, Argentina coach Lionel Scaloni leaves World Cup final press conference midway
results.description: Lionel Scaloni broke down in tears after Argentina's FIFA World Cup 2026 final defeat to Spain, leaving his post-match press conference midway after being asked about his future. The Argentina coach admitted he was unsure whether he would continue beyond his contract, raising fresh questions over his long-term role after one of the most successful eras in the nation's football history.
